prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京外国语大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名约第 79–82 名，近年排名基本稳定，属于语言类院校最高学府；2026 年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及考研名师学历造假争议等事件；抖音热度评价为"较热"，综合热度排名第 39 位，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；外国语言文学为 A+学科（全国顶尖），是该校核心优势；理科招生专业中含计算机科学与技术（数智技术）、大数据管理与应用等热门工科方向，与北外语言优势形成交叉。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度高热推荐，对理科考生吸引力强；河南省 2026 年高考总人数约 120 万（较 2025 年增长约 32%），按比例估算物理类考生约 73.4 万人，考生规模大幅增加，竞争加剧；2026 年；北京外国语大学位于北京市（非本省），对河南考生而言属于跨省报考。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年略有回升、2026 年计划小幅扩招 12.5% 缓解竞争、河南省物理类考生大幅增长约 32% 加剧竞争、理科招生专业含计算机等热门方向吸引力较强等因素，考虑考生大增带来的竞争加剧效应，小幅前移修正；预测 2026 年理科最低位次约 22459 名，区间 21959–22959 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 10535→19260→23029→21656→20939, with a significant decline from 2021 to 2023 and a slight recovery in 2024–2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 20939, approximately 717 places earlier than 2024, indicating a slight easing of competition; the enrollment plan for this university in Henan science (physics category) was 16 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 16 in 2025, remaining generally stable; the 2026 plan is 18, an increase of 2 (+12.5%) compared to 2025, a small expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 79–82 in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with a generally stable ranking in recent years, and is the highest institution among language universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving incidents such as the controversy over the fake academic qualifications of a famous postgraduate entrance exam teacher; the Douyin popularity evaluation is "relatively hot," with a comprehensive popularity ranking of 39th, and short video platform exposure is moderately high; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), which is the core advantage of the university; the science enrollment majors include popular engineering directions such as Computer Science and Technology (Digital Intelligence Technology) and Big Data Management and Application, intersecting with BFSU's language advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, electronic information/communication and other majors are highly recommended by social heat, with strong appeal to science candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan college entrance examination is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% compared to 2025), with an estimated 734,000 physics category candidates by proportion, a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying competition; 2026; Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing (not the home province), so it is a cross-province application for Henan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the slight recovery in historical rankings in the past two years, the small expansion of 12.5% in the 2026 plan to ease competition, the significant increase of about 32% in physics category candidates in Henan province intensifying competition, and the strong appeal of science enrollment majors including popular directions like computer science, with the effect of intensified competition due to the large increase in candidates, a slight forward adjustment is made; the predicted minimum ranking for science in 2026 is about 22459, with a range of 21959–22959.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1802→1750→1954→2188→2268, showing a gradual downward trend over the years, with a cumulative decline of about 466 positions in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2268, continuing to decline by about 80 positions compared to 2024, indicating intensifying competition; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Henan was 16 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 23 in 2023, 23 in 2024, and 24 in 2025, showing a steady expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 27, an increase of 3 (+12.5%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, which will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Foreign Studies University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 79–82 in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years, and is the top institution among language universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving controversies such as the academic credential fraud of a famous postgraduate tutor; in 2023, there was a signal of a significant decline in admission rankings for minor language majors; the Douyin popularity evaluation is 'relatively hot', with a comprehensive popularity ranking of 39th, with medium to high exposure on short video platforms and moderate application attention; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), which is the core advantage of the university and strongly attracts language-oriented candidates; however, the social popularity of foreign language majors has been in a 'generally wait-and-see' state in recent years, with popularity not as high as engineering fields like computer science and electrical engineering.

专业热度与地域.text: In the 2024 major popularity assessment, foreign language majors were rated as 'generally wait-and-see', with overall popularity stable but slightly cool; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (an increase of about 32% compared to 2025), with an estimated 466,000 history category candidates, a significant increase in candidate scale, intensifying competition; 2026; Beijing Foreign Studies University is located in Beijing (not in the province), so for Henan candidates, it is a cross-province application, and regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in historical rankings, the 12.5% expansion of the 2026 plan which somewhat alleviates competition, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in Henan Province which intensifies competition, and the stable but slightly cool popularity of foreign language majors, a slight upward adjustment is made due to the intensified competition from the large increase in candidates; the predicted minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is about 2408, with a range of 1974–2842.
